rules.condition: force increases while area stays the same
reasoning_steps: Pressure is calculated as force divided by area.
If area is unchanged, increasing force increases the numerator.

rules.condition: area increases while force stays the same
reasoning_steps: Pressure is calculated as force divided by area.
If force is unchanged, increasing area increases the denominator.
Force is calculated as mass multiplied by acceleration.
Increasing either factor while the other is unchanged increases the product.

rules.condition: work increases while time stays the same
reasoning_steps: Power is calculated as work divided by time.
If time is unchanged, increasing work increases the numerator.

rules.condition: time increases while work stays the same
reasoning_steps: Power is calculated as work divided by time.
If work is unchanged, increasing time increases the denominator.
